title: Defective Cartridge
shortDescription: The toner cartridge has a defect and cannot be used.
fullDescription: The cartridge chip reports a defect or the cartridge is damaged.

fixSteps.title: Check Supply Status
fixSteps.instruction: View the supplies status on the control panel or web interface.

fixSteps.title: Replace Supply
fixSteps.instruction: Follow the on-screen guide to replace the indicated supply.

fixSteps.title: Verify Installation
fixSteps.instruction: Ensure the supply is fully seated and recognized.

fixSteps.title: Print Test Page
fixSteps.instruction: Print a test page to verify proper operation.

whenToCallPro: If the error persists after basic troubleshooting.

faq.a: Error 31 indicates the toner cartridge has a defect and cannot be used.
Supply and paper errors usually halt printing. Some warnings allow continued operation.

faq.q: Where can I get Lexmark parts?
faq.a: Lexmark parts are available from Lexmark's online store, authorized dealers, and major office supply retailers.

title: Paper Too Short
shortDescription: The paper is too short for the print job.
fullDescription: The loaded paper is shorter than the configured size.

causes.cause: Primary cause for paper too short

fixSteps.title: Open Access Doors
fixSteps.instruction: Open all printer doors and locate the jammed paper.

fixSteps.title: Remove Jammed Paper
fixSteps.instruction: Carefully pull paper in the direction of travel.

fixSteps.title: Check for Fragments
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect for torn paper pieces with a flashlight.

fixSteps.title: Close and Resume
fixSteps.instruction: Close all doors and press Go to resume.

whenToCallPro: If the error persists after basic troubleshooting.

faq.a: Error 34 indicates the paper is too short for the print job.
Supply and paper errors usually halt printing. Some warnings allow continued operation.

faq.q: Where can I get Lexmark parts?
faq.a: Lexmark parts are available from Lexmark's online store, authorized dealers, and major office supply retailers.

title: Insufficient Memory
shortDescription: Not enough memory to complete the job.
fullDescription: The printer ran out of memory processing the print job.

fixSteps.title: Power Cycle
fixSteps.instruction: Turn off, unplug for 3 minutes, restart.

fixSteps.title: Check Components
fixSteps.instruction: Verify all components are properly installed.

fixSteps.title: Reset to Defaults
fixSteps.instruction: If needed, reset network or printer settings to defaults.

fixSteps.title: Contact Support
fixSteps.instruction: If the error persists, contact Lexmark support.

whenToCallPro: If the error persists after basic troubleshooting.

faq.a: Error 35 indicates not enough memory to complete the job.
Supply and paper errors usually halt printing. Some warnings allow continued operation.

title: Paper Jam
shortDescription: Paper is jammed inside the printer.
fullDescription: Paper is stuck in the paper path.

fixSteps.title: Open Access Doors
fixSteps.instruction: Open all printer doors and locate the jammed paper.

fixSteps.title: Remove Jammed Paper
fixSteps.instruction: Carefully pull paper in the direction of travel.

fixSteps.title: Check for Fragments
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect for torn paper pieces with a flashlight.

fixSteps.title: Close and Resume
fixSteps.instruction: Close all doors and press Go to resume.

whenToCallPro: If the error persists after basic troubleshooting.

faq.a: Error 200 indicates paper is jammed inside the printer.
